title: Hyperliquid loses Anthropic, OpenAI markets as creator shuts down project
summary: Ventuals, one of the teams behind real-world asset perpetuals on Hyperliquid, said it is closing its markets and joining another project in the ecosystem.

title: If America wants to lead in crypto, it must protect the people who build it
summary: Despite the Clarity Act’s advancement toward the finish line, there’s one provision under threat for builders that can’t be overlooked, argues Smith.

title: ‘Crypto spring’ is here, says one analyst after bitcoin's key signals turn bullish
summary: Standard Chartered analyst Geoffrey Kendrick's bullish call comes as spot bitcoin exchange-traded fund inflows return, oil prices fall and Coinbase's CEO says bitcoin likely bottomed near $60,000.

title: Kraken debuts U.S. perpetual futures as crypto derivatives move onshore
summary: Perpetual futures generated more than $60 trillion in volume last year, according to the crypto exchange, largely outside the U.S.

title: Coinbase's Brian Armstrong says bitcoin may have bottomed at $60,000
summary: Armstrong said his instinct is that bitcoin has probably found its floor, pointing to the four-year cycle that has historically marked lows.
